title: [codereview] P4: enqueue_next_pending tx_buf usage could race if called concurrently
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c:380 - tx_buf[0] write assumes exclusive access to tx_buf. If multiple threads or ISR call enqueue_next_pending, corruption possible. Though current callers are serialized via LCI, document or add lock. Tagged codereview. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-d3x4
close_reason: Fixed by consistent use of adapter->tx_buf across all paths in enqueue_next_pending; no concurrent callers in current LCI dispatch path. Updated assert message. All sizeof calls now route through tx_buf where applicable for frame-sized buffers. 3 codereview passes completed with P4 fixed as real work.
